pi_items.source: Checked setup_task.sh and export_result.sh where the result file is hardcoded as /tmp/complete_employee_onboarding_result.json.
Checked setup_task.sh which explicitly creates this file at /home/ga/Desktop/new_hire_spec.txt.
Checked setup_task.sh which dynamically generates the spec file with these exact employee details.
Checked verifier.py which evaluates success using 'passed = score >= 60'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating two employee records in OrangeHRM: Alex Chen (EMP021, Marketing) and Maria Santos (EMP022, Finance). The task setup script synthesizes a specification file at /home/ga/Desktop/new_hire_spec.txt with their details. The pass threshold for the verifier is 60 points.
